---
title: "Training Program"
format: html
---

> Join us on our journey towards a better ocean by building your superpowers in ocean data stewardship.

<br>

### Build your data superpowers for lasting impact

Wherever you are on your data journey, we can help you connect your data to action. Learn how you can contribute to a more open, connected, and impactful future for ocean data from our experts in ocean data stewardship or on your own with our materials. Our core focus is to make data more useful, useable, and used to drive better decision making for the future of ocean sustainability and climate action.

<br> 

### Training program

Intertidal Agency's Ocean Data Stewardship training program seeks to build a global community of ocean data stewards who are active in making ocean data more reusable and used for action.  

<br>
